title: [epic] Raspberry Pi + LoRa HAT border router
description: RPi 4/5 + RAK2287 or similar LoRa HAT as production border router. Full Linux, Ethernet, easy remote management. Power hungry (~3W) but serious deployment option. Supports: WireGuard tunnels, Prometheus metrics, SSH. $80+. Need: HAT driver integration, systemd services, deployment docs.
